allow: Bash(ssh warren@192.168.0.112 "sudo dmesg | grep -i ''usb\\|acm\\|tty'' | grep -v ''xhci\\|hub\\|root\\|registered\\|ttyAMA\\|RFCOMM\\|serial-getty\\|getty'' | tail -20")
Bash(ssh warren@192.168.0.112 "sudo systemctl stop scoreboard && mkdir -p /tmp/diagnostic/diagnostic && echo ''stopped''")
Bash(ssh warren@192.168.0.112 "arduino-cli compile -b arduino:avr:uno /tmp/diagnostic/diagnostic && arduino-cli upload -b arduino:avr:uno -p /dev/ttyACM0 /tmp/diagnostic/diagnostic")

Bash(ssh warren@192.168.0.112 "arduino-cli compile -b arduino:avr:uno /tmp/scoreboard-sketch/scoreboard && arduino-cli upload -b arduino:avr:uno -p /dev/ttyACM0 /tmp/scoreboard-sketch/scoreboard && sudo systemctl start scoreboard")
Bash(ssh warren@192.168.0.112 "sudo systemctl status scoreboard --no-pager && sudo journalctl -u scoreboard -n 20 --no-pager")

Bash(powershell -Command "$port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort COM3,57600; $port.Open\(\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2000; $port.Write\('1#'\); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 3000; $response = $port.ReadExisting\(\); $port.Close\(\); Write-Output $response")

Bash(powershell -File - <<'PS1'
$port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort\("COM3", 57600\)
$port.Open\(\)
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2000
$port.Write\("1#"\)
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 3000
$response = $port.ReadExisting\(\)
$port.Close\(\)
Write-Output $response
PS1)

Bash(powershell -File - <<'PS1'
$port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort\("COM3", 57600\)
$port.DtrEnable = $true
$port.Open\(\)
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2000
$boot = $port.ReadExisting\(\)
Write-Output "Boot: $boot"
$port.Write\("1#"\)
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 3000
$r1 = $port.ReadExisting\(\)
Write-Output "After 1#: $r1"
$port.Write\("0#"\)
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2000
$r0 = $port.ReadExisting\(\)
Write-Output "After 0#: $r0"
$port.Write\("2#"\)
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 3000
$r2 = $port.ReadExisting\(\)
Write-Output "After 2#: $r2"
$port.Close\(\)
PS1)

Bash(powershell -File - <<'PS1'
$port = New-Object System.IO.Ports.SerialPort\("COM3", 57600\)
$port.DtrEnable = $true
$port.Open\(\)
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 2000
$boot = $port.ReadExisting\(\)
Write-Output "Boot: $boot"
$port.Write\("t#"\)
Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 6000
$r = $port.ReadExisting\(\)
Write-Output "Response: $r"
$port.Close\(\)
PS1)
